---
title: "About"
---

I am Kyle Cahitas, an environmental scientist based in San Luis Obispo,
California. I work at the intersection of GIS, applied statistics, and machine
learning, mostly on environmental and agricultural questions.

This site collects my research projects, maps, a few tools, and occasional
writing. It is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and published through
GitHub Pages.

Reach me at [kcahitas@calpoly.edu](mailto:kcahitas@calpoly.edu).
